comment.body:
one more thought for this:
you know, i got and get a lot of job offers from big funds, desks, from the USA to the Middle-East.
i refused all of them, but with some of them i stay in friendship and we talk in private a lot.
very educative.

you know, the shady thing is the size of those condors..
funds like to hide there trades exactly bcs they don't want to influence the market and also they don't want to reveal themselves for their "opponents".
(not counting in the JPM collar bcs thats just a hedging trade)
when you see the condor it is clearly an attempt for local market making.

So this is my very strong and serious impression.
